introSection: Racer was a racing wooden roller coaster previously located at Kennywood in West Mifflin, Pennsylvania, USA. The ride was also called Aerial Racer, Mountain Joy Ride, and Aerial Joy Ride.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was remodeled in 1921 and was reportedly "faster and more exciting, practically rebuilt."

The ride closed after the 1926 season.

fullText:
Racer was a racing wooden roller coaster previously located at Kennywood in West Mifflin, Pennsylvania, USA. The ride was also called Aerial Racer, Mountain Joy Ride, and Aerial Joy Ride.

The ride was remodeled in 1921 and was reportedly "faster and more exciting, practically rebuilt."

The ride closed after the 1926 season.
